magic.name: Magic
magic.description: Occult mastery that taps power external to a wielder’s nature—how Sorcerers and some Gods work miracles (not the same as “all divine miracles are magical”).
magic.mechanicalEffects: Innate: sense Sorcerers; after witnessing another’s Marvel/Boon in scene, reduce your Legend cost to emulate that effect with Magic by 1 (min 1). Heroes with Magic access one Working; Demigods two; Gods three; Techniques as Heroic Knacks. Scions/Gods gain Magic only via Relics/Guides (PDF).

denizenEarthFriend.name: Earth Friend (Denizen)
denizenEarthFriend.description: Kinship with stone, soil, and buried things.
denizenEarthFriend.mechanicalEffects: Innate: see through earth/stone/concrete to Short range without light. Boons: Animate Earth, Commanding the Solid Earth (see PDF pp. 45–46).

denizenIllusions.name: Illusions (Denizen)
denizenIllusions.mechanicalEffects: Innate: see through illusions/disguises; trivial lies detected in your presence; +2 Enhancement vs deliberate lies. Boons: Disguise, Impersonation (PDF p. 46).

denizenLair.name: Lair (Denizen)
denizenLair.description: Your legend merges with a place you haunt or protect.
denizenLair.mechanicalEffects: Innate: awareness of intrusion/changes; fetch/store portable items 1/scene; travel to Lair in ~1 hour; Otherworld access may cost Legend. Boons: Homeward Shortcut, Encroaching Den, Sanctum and Refuge (PDF pp. 46–47).

denizenObdurance.name: Obdurance (Denizen)
denizenObdurance.description: Oaths and guardianships made as physical law.
denizenObdurance.mechanicalEffects: Innate: sworn oaths (Legend count) resist betrayal; bypass obstacles by taking Wounds. Boons: Bar the Way, Booming Voice of Conviction, Icon of Resolve (PDF pp. 47–48).

denizenTransformation.name: Transformation (Denizen)
denizenTransformation.description: Refuse a single shape—skins, beasts, and stranger masks.
denizenTransformation.mechanicalEffects: Innate: change form (simple action in Action play); pick benefits per imbue (identity, object, movement, armor, natural weapons). Boons: Counterfeit Visage, Parade of Skins, Shapes of Might (PDF pp. 48–49).

denizenWaterFriend.name: Water Friend (Denizen)
denizenWaterFriend.description: Command water and move as liquid lightning.
denizenWaterFriend.mechanicalEffects: Innate: Speed Scale 1 in water; fight underwater freely; aquatic animals +1 Attitude. Boons: Watery Hospitality, Water Mastery (PDF p. 49).

denizenWindFriend.name: Wind Friend (Denizen)
denizenWindFriend.description: Winds obey; breath survives poison and fall.
denizenWindFriend.mechanicalEffects: Innate: breathe any air; immune to mundane smoke/toxic gas (non-supernatural); see through fog; winds slow falls. Marvels per PDF p. 49.
